RIA.title: Realistic – Investigative – Artistic Profile
RIA.summary: This interest profile combines Realistic, Investigative, and Artistic tendencies. You are primarily drawn to practical, hands‑on activities involving tools, machines, or physical work, while also enjoying analytical thinking, research, and solving complex intellectual problems and creative expression, imagination, and innovative design.
RIA.work_style: You may thrive in environments that allow you to use realistic strengths first, supported by investigative thinking and artistic approaches.
RIA.student_guidance: Explore career paths where your realistic strengths can lead, while integrating investigative and artistic abilities. Activities such as internships, projects, or clubs related to these interests can help you confirm whether these directions fit you.
